fields.title: Improve backlog renderCall: concise header, move flags below separator
fields.description: Current renderCall dumps the full raw command string as the header, which is ugly for long commands with many flags.nnDesired behavior:n- Header shows only the concise command: e.g. 'backlog create "Title"', 'backlog close tau-ylib', 'backlog list', 'backlog show tau-xqww'n- Meaningful flags (--reason, --description, --type, --priority, --status, etc.) render as labeled metadata lines below the separator, e.g.:n  reason: Donen  type: taskn  priority: 1n- Strip --description from header entirely (too long), show as 'description: (first ~60 chars)...' below separator if presentnnFile: extensions/tau/src/backlog/tool.ts, renderCall functionnRun 'npm run gate' from extensions/tau/ after changes.
